savedquery.name: Expiring — Next 45 Days
savedquery.description: Active insurance policies expiring within 45 days. Drives the expiry dashboard in Active Allowances area.
savedquery.fetchxml: <fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false"> <entity name="va_insurancepolicy"> <attribute name="va_name" /> <attribute name="va_policyType" /> <attribute name="va_carrierName" /> <attribute name="va_policyNumber" /> <attribute name="va_expirationDate" /> <attribute name="va_meetsLiabilityRequirement" /> <attribute name="va_meetsUmbrellaRequirement" /> <attribute name="va_isActive" /> <link-entity name="va_allowancerecord" from="va_allowancerecordid" to="va_linkedallowancerecordid" alias="ar" link-type="inner"> <attribute name="va_applicantName" alias="applicantName" /> <attribute name="va_personnelNumber" alias="personnelNumber" /> <attribute name="va_applicantCompany" alias="company" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="va_status" operator="eq" value="720000400" /> </filter> </link-entity> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="va_isActive" operator="eq" value="1" /> <condition attribute="va_expirationDate" operator="next-x-days" value="45" /> </filter> <order attribute="va_expirationDate" descending="false" /> </entity> </fetch>
savedquery.layoutxml: <grid name="resultset" jump="va_name" select="1" preview="1" icon="1"> <row name="result" id="va_insurancepolicyid"> <cell name="applicantName" width="160" /> <cell name="personnelNumber" width="100" /> <cell name="company" width="130" /> <cell name="va_policyType" width="120" /> <cell name="va_carrierName" width="140" /> <cell name="va_policyNumber" width="130" /> <cell name="va_expirationDate" width="110" /> <cell name="va_meetsLiabilityRequirement" width="100" /> <cell name="va_meetsUmbrellaRequirement" width="100" /> </row> </grid>

savedquery.name: All Active Policies
savedquery.description: All insurance policies currently marked active
savedquery.fetchxml: <fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false"> <entity name="va_insurancepolicy"> <attribute name="va_name" /> <attribute name="va_policyType" /> <attribute name="va_carrierName" /> <attribute name="va_policyNumber" /> <attribute name="va_expirationDate" /> <attribute name="va_meetsLiabilityRequirement" /> <attribute name="va_meetsUmbrellaRequirement" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="va_isActive" operator="eq" value="1" /> </filter> <order attribute="va_expirationDate" descending="false" /> </entity> </fetch>
savedquery.layoutxml: <grid name="resultset" jump="va_name" select="1" preview="1" icon="1"> <row name="result" id="va_insurancepolicyid"> <cell name="va_name" width="150" /> <cell name="va_policyType" width="120" /> <cell name="va_carrierName" width="140" /> <cell name="va_policyNumber" width="130" /> <cell name="va_expirationDate" width="110" /> <cell name="va_meetsLiabilityRequirement" width="100" /> <cell name="va_meetsUmbrellaRequirement" width="100" /> </row> </grid>
